content.text: Decomposing the objective into 3 subtasks (2 parallel + 1 dependent).

tasks.title: Research the existing architecture
tasks.prompt: Summarize the backend architecture and list the key modules.

tasks.title: Audit accessibility
tasks.prompt: Audit the frontend for accessibility issues and list them.

tasks.title: Implement the fix
tasks.prompt: Apply the highest-priority fix found by research and the a11y audit.

result: The structured plan has been delivered: 3 subtasks (2 parallel + 1 dependent).

tasks.title: Research the existing architecture
tasks.prompt: Summarize the backend architecture and list the key modules.
